name: 数组
subject: cs
domain_name: 算法与编程 / Algorithms & Programming / Algorithms & Programming
curriculum_points: 1 Understand how and why computers use binary to represent all forms of data
2 (a) Understand the denary, binary and hexadecimal number systems
2 (b) Convert between (i) positive denary and positive binary (ii) positive denary and positive hexadecimal (iii) positive hexadecimal and positive binary
